info.title: Project Verdify MVP API
info.description: REST API for AI-powered greenhouse MVP. HTTPS required for all endpoints. Metric units on wire. ETag used for config/plan. Device identity via device_name (verdify-aabbcc). Rate limiting applies to telemetry endpoints to prevent DoS attacks.

get.description: Returns service health status for load balancers and monitoring
Returns list of supported sensor types for device configuration
Returns list of supported actuator types for device configuration

post.description: OAuth2 compatible token login, get an access token for future requests
Test access token
Password Recovery
Reset password
HTML Content for Password Recovery

get.summary: Get CSRF token for browser-based authentication
get.description: Generate a CSRF token for use in X-CSRF-Token header for browser requests

post.description:
Controller announces itself on first boot.

Public endpoint (no authentication). Creates or finds controller record.
Returns claim status and controller info if already claimed.

Claim a controller to a greenhouse and issue device_token.

Requires JWT authentication. Sets claim_code and device_token.

One-time exchange of claim_code + device_name for long-lived device_token & initial ETags.

Public endpoint. Idempotent: returns same result on repeated calls after first success.
First successful call returns 201, subsequent calls return 200.

Rotate device token for controller.

Requires JWT authentication. Generates new device token.

Revoke device token for controller.

Requires JWT authentication. Invalidates device token.

Materialize and publish config snapshot for a greenhouse.

This endpoint:
1. Gathers all configuration data from database tables
2. Validates completeness and constraints
3. Generates deterministic config payload with ETag
4. Optionally persists as new snapshot (unless dry_run=True)

Args:
    greenhouse_id: Target greenhouse UUID
    request: Publish options (dry_run flag)
    session: Database session
    current_user: Authenticated user
    
Returns:
    ConfigPublishResult with version, ETag, and complete payload
    
Raises:
    HTTPException: 404 if greenhouse not found, 400 for validation errors

get.description:
Diff current DB config vs last published snapshot.

This endpoint compares the current database state with the most recently
published configuration snapshot to identify changes.

Args:
    greenhouse_id: Target greenhouse UUID
    session: Database session
    current_user: Authenticated user
    
Returns:
    ConfigDiff with added, removed, and changed paths
    
Raises:
    HTTPException: 404 if greenhouse not found
Fetch configuration for controller by device name. Uses ETag for caching.
Fetch configuration for the authenticated controller. Uses ETag for caching.
List plan versions for a greenhouse with pagination and filtering.

200.description: List of plan versions with pagination

post.description: Create a new plan version for a greenhouse. Only one plan can be active at a time.

get.description: Fetch plan for controller by controller ID. Uses ETag for caching.

get.summary: Controller fetches current plan for authenticated device
get.description: Fetch plan for the authenticated controller. Uses ETag for caching.

delete.description: Permanently delete a specific zone crop instance (use with caution)

get.description: Get historical crop data for AI analysis

get.summary: List Zone Crop Observations By Id

schema.title: Response Crops-List Zone Crop Observations By Id

get.description:
List zones with optional filtering and sorting.

Supports filtering by greenhouse_id and sorting by various fields.
The is_active filter is ignored as this field is not currently modeled in the Zone table.

post.description: Create a new zone.

get.description: Get a specific zone by ID.

post.description: Create a new zone crop planting

409.description: Conflict - active crop already exists in zone

get.description: List zone crops with filtering and pagination
Get zone crop by ID

post.description: Create a new zone crop observation

get.description: List observations with filtering and pagination
Get observation by ID

List controllers with optional filtering and sorting.

- **greenhouse_id**: Filter to specific greenhouse (optional)
- **is_climate_controller**: Filter by climate controller status (optional)  
- **sort**: Sort by device_name or created_at, prefix with '-' for descending
- **page/page_size**: Standard pagination parameters

Returns paginated list of controllers the user has access to.

post.description:
Create a new controller.

- **device_name**: Must follow 'verdify-XXXXXX' pattern
- **greenhouse_id**: Must be a greenhouse the user owns
- **is_climate_controller**: Whether this controls climate (default: false)

Validates device_name uniqueness and greenhouse ownership.

get.description:
Get a specific controller by ID.

User must own the greenhouse containing this controller.

patch.description:
Update a controller.

- **is_climate_controller**: Can be changed (subject to uniqueness constraint)
- **label**: Can be updated
- **versions**: fw_version, hw_version can be updated

Enforces business rules around climate controller uniqueness.

delete.description:
Delete a controller.

This will also revoke any associated device tokens and cascade delete
related sensors, actuators, etc.

get.description: List sensors with optional filtering.

post.description: Create a new sensor.

get.description: Get sensor by ID.

post.description: Map a sensor to a zone (multi-zone supported).
